title: Door Decor
description: This resource pack adds a decoration to every door in the game!
body:
This pack adds 17 new textures for each of the doors in the game! I'll list the following door wreaths here:

Oak door: Has an apple hanging from oak leaves
Spruce door: Has a spruce leaves wreath with mistletoe and a red bow
Birch door: Has a "half and half" wreath with birch leaves and sticks
Jungle door: Has cocoa beans on jungle leaves
Acacia door: Has a white bow on acacia leaves
Dark oak door: Has red and brown mushrooms on dark oak leaves
Mangrove door: Has a hanging lilypad
Cherry door: Has pink petals on cherry logs
Pale oak door: Has resin clumps on pale oak leaves
Bamboo door: Has a wreath made of bent bamboo
Warped & crimson door: Each has the opposite biome's wood and mushrooms on it
Iron door: Has an iron golem-inspired poppy wreath
Copper doors: Each have a doorplate inspired by the Iron Doorplate from Animal Crossing, and it gets less oxidized as it goes down to contrast

This pack works on all versions after 1.21.4. The pack will technically say that it wasn't made for that version, but it'll still work perfectly fine. 

I plan on updating this pack if Mojang ever adds a new door, so stay tuned if you want an updated version!
